question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/controller/TopicController.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getTopic()] Can an unprivileged external user flood GET /api/v1/topics/{id} with high-concurrency requests during a database network partition to exhaust the JDBC/JPA connection pool, causing all subsequent legitimate requests to hang indefinitely or receive 500 errors, resulting in full service unavailability?
